programmes.show_description: Crime thriller with Justin Timberlake. A student becomes the protege of a corrupt gambling tycoon in Costa Rica, only to come under pressure from the FBI to help bring his boss to justice.
Thriller with Sean Patrick Flanery. When a hospital is taken by terrorists, a decorated veteran is forced to face the demons from his past as he uses all the skills at his disposal to free it.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A man returns home to find his beloved Dachshund maimed and bleeding in a neighbour's backyard.
A landlord accuses his teen tenant's boyfriend of head-butting him during an altercation; when he pushes back, the police are called.
Concerned about the fate of a Pomeranian puppy, a breeder drives 6 hours to rescue the animal from an allegedly negligent pet owner.
A woman being sued by her ex-lover for the return of his belongings claims she had to sell them to survive.
A 13-year-old boy is asked to step out of the courtroom before his family members start fighting over living expenses and a restraining order.
Breaking up via a text message, inappropriate courtroom attire and a used computer come into play when exes dispute custody of a Lenovo laptop.
After dating a single parent for only eight weeks, a woman claims she loaned him money to buy a new truck because his old truck was in danger of being repossessed.
A woman slides into a fire hydrant during an ice storm and totals the car her father's friend was letting her borrow; she admits it was the second car she has totalled.
A woman drops off her two children at daycare and doesn't pick them up for months; she is sued for childcare costs.

In 2003, as the area of Hamblen County, Tennessee struggles with the growing opioid crisis, the body of a local woman is discovered.
1990 was supposed to be a time of new beginnings for Sharon Gill. But this would change in a matter of minutes when she was discovered brutally murdered in her new home.
Nearly four decades after the death of Hollywood star Natalie Wood, investigators reveal new clues, new witnesses and a shocking revelation.
The discovery of vital evidence helps detectives piece together the case.
A woman vanishes without a trace. But, twenty years on, a clump of hair and a dedicated team of scientists uncover the victim's body.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A corrupt sheriff fakes an accident to disguise his murder of a trucker who refused to help his drug smuggling.
Crime thriller starring Mark Wahlberg. A former smuggler heads to Panama to protect his brother-in-law from a ruthless drug lord and to score millions of dollars in counterfeit bills.
Thriller with Christopher Lambert. After witnessing a murder, an executive is marked for death by a ninja cult, but receives help from a modern-day samurai who has an ancestral feud with them.
Comedy thriller with Nicolas Cage. Two cops discover a drug dealer's hidden safe and hatch a plan to break into it, but by the time they realise it's a bad idea, it's too late to turn back.
Chilling Gothic horror. A young woman investigates a string of supernatural events that appear to be linked to the suicide of her aristocratic husband's first wife.

A woman fights with her mother and step-father over the payback of household expenses.
A woman claims mould took over her home and she lost nine women's tenancies; her landlord insists there was no water damage.
Ex-roommates admit guns were in play during the difficult time they tried to live together; a purebred cat is allegedly left to fend for itself.
A Montgomery realtor suggests a profitmaking plan to a homeowner which he claims ended in harassment and thousands in debt.
A man accuses his ex-girlfriend of smashing out his car windows; she claims it was his new girlfriend who did the deed.
A woman kicks her son out of her house on Mother's Day and is left to deal with a troubled teenager living in her basement.
A musician accuses a man of destroying her $11,500 violin when he allegedly fell on it while intoxicated; he claims it was a medical condition.

A retired UPS driver reveals new details about cult leader David Koresh and what led up to the deadly standoff with law enforcement nearly 25 years ago.
Helen Torbet visited the Highlands every year, but over the years the son of its proprietors - Don MacMillan Junior - had developed an unhealthy obsession with her.
In the US, Rebecca Fenton murdered her husband and staged a break-in. Her calm, image-obsessed behaviour masked a chilling psychology. She was sentenced to life in 2015.
James Ray III, a US lawyer with a secret past, kills his partner Angela after an abusive relationship. He flees, is caught, but dies in jail before sentencing.

Movie star Bunny Blake receives a mysterious opal ring from her hometown fan club which enables her to see images of her friends and family.
After causing a hit-and-run accident that killed a child, then letting his co-worker take the blame, a man is relentlessly haunted by his suddenly aggressive car.
Action thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A disgraced narcotics cop-turned-sheriff on the Mexican border gets the chance to prove his worth when an escaped drug lord tries to flee the US.
Thriller with Sylvester Stallone. A bereaved and alcoholic FBI agent in rehab discovers that a killer is targeting the patients - forcing him to pull himself together to prevent more deaths.
